properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 40/17
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS FROM 15 MAY BY POLAR EMPRESS-LAER7
VESSEL IS TOWING SEISMIC CABLES IN AREA B0UND BY.
A.72-25.0N 015-41.0E
B.72-25.0N 018-55.0E
C.71-05.0N 019-20.0E
D.71-05.0N 016-20.0E
VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 6 NM.
GUARD VESSEL SANCO SKY AND ANDREA IN ATTENDANCE
